# tabURLs

**Instance Property**

Indicates the URLs that the window should initially load as tabs.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var tabURLs: [URL] { get }
```

## Discussion

If [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/WindowConfiguration/tabURLs] and [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/WindowConfiguration/tabs] are both empty, the app’s default start page should appear in a tab.

## Related Documentation

- **tabs**: Indicates the existing tabs that should be moved to the window.
